new_claims.claim_text: Iran attacked Kuwait’s Ministry of Oil building as retaliation for US and Israel actions.
US and Israel bombed petrochemical facilities in Iran.
US and Israel bombed over 760 schools and 350 health centers in Iran, constituting war crimes.
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim regarding military action and war crimes, attributed to Al Jazeera.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump issued an ultimatum to Iran: 48 hours to open the Strait of Hormuz or 'all hell will reign down'.
new_claims.notes: Unverified claim attributed to Donald Trump regarding military threat.

new_claims.claim_text: Trump has been taken to Walter Reed Hospital.
